summary: The user required the stray monitor to show all individual miss events in a scrollable log instead of only the latest event.
The user required the model panel to show collected MB/GB against both the minimum tuning threshold and the full 24B corpus target.
The user corrected arbitrary progress math and required model-data collection to be derived from the 24B goal rather than file counts.
The latest 4 user directives and 4 assistant responses should be preserved as engine memory and training data.
captured_user_directives: Render the stray monitor as a scrollable log of all individual miss events.
Represent model-data progress in exact MB/GB and compare current data with the amount needed to begin training or tuning.
Derive model-data progress from the 24B goal instead of arbitrary percentages.
Commit the latest 4 user and 4 assistant responses into the memory engine and training-data pipeline.
captured_assistant_responses: Implemented the stray monitor as a scrollable event log backed by live stray-event payloads.
Added storage-based model metrics showing collected bytes, minimum tuning bytes, and full target bytes.
Corrected model-progress derivation to use 24B params, 20 target tokens per param, and 4 bytes per token.
Prepared a new memory bundle so the recent dialog is persisted into repo-backed memory and training artifacts.
